_**User**_

Explore the scanner-desktop C# application to understand:
1. How scanning settings are configured (color mode, brightness, contrast, DPI, threshold) - look at ScannerService.cs and any WIA/TWAIN code
2. How the scanned images are processed (trimming, deskewing, etc.) - look at ImageHelper.cs or similar
3. How images are converted to PDF - look at PdfService.cs or similar
4. How the upload to API works - look at ApiService.cs
5. How template settings from the API are displayed in the UI - look at MainForm.cs

Focus on the scanning settings configuration (WIA properties for color mode, brightness, contrast, threshold) and the PDF generation quality settings. Report back the key code sections for each area.

The codebase is at d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\

Here’s a concise report of the relevant code for each area.

---

## 1. Scanning Settings (Color, Brightness, Contrast, DPI, Threshold)

### WIA (`ScannerService.cs`)

WIA property IDs:

```24:29:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\ScannerService.cs
        // WIA Item property IDs (WIA 2.0 spec)
        private const int WIA_IPS_XRES       = 6147;
        private const int WIA_IPS_YRES       = 6148;
        private const int WIA_IPS_CUR_INTENT = 6146;
        private const int WIA_IPS_BRIGHTNESS = 6154;
        private const int WIA_IPS_CONTRAST   = 6155;
```

Color mode via intent:

```38:41:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\ScannerService.cs
        // Scan intent bitmask values
        private const int WIA_INTENT_IMAGE_TYPE_COLOR     = 4;
        private const int WIA_INTENT_IMAGE_TYPE_GRAYSCALE = 2;
        private const int WIA_INTENT_IMAGE_TYPE_TEXT      = 1;
```

How properties are set during scanning:

```110:119:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\ScannerService.cs
                SetWiaProperty(item.Properties, WIA_IPS_XRES, template.DPI);
                SetWiaProperty(item.Properties, WIA_IPS_YRES, template.DPI);

                int intent = ColorModeToIntent(template.ColorMode);
                SetWiaProperty(item.Properties, WIA_IPS_CUR_INTENT, intent);
                if (template.BrightnessAdj != 0)
                    SetWiaProperty(item.Properties, WIA_IPS_BRIGHTNESS, template.BrightnessAdj);
                if (template.ContrastAdj != 0)
                    SetWiaProperty(item.Properties, WIA_IPS_CONTRAST, template.ContrastAdj);
```

**Threshold:** There is no WIA threshold property in this code. WIA is configured only for DPI, intent (color mode), brightness, and contrast.

### TWAIN (`TwainScannerService.cs`)

Main capability application:

```152:195:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\TwainScannerService.cs
        private void ApplyCapabilities(DataSource source, ScanTemplate template, ScanSource scanSource)
        {
            // Resolution from template
            SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapXResolution.SetValue((TWFix32)template.DPI));
            SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapYResolution.SetValue((TWFix32)template.DPI));

            // Pixel type
            var pixelType = template.ColorMode switch
            {
                "Color"      => PixelType.RGB,
                "BlackWhite" => PixelType.BlackWhite,
                _            => PixelType.Gray,
            };
            SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapPixelType.SetValue(pixelType));

            // ...

            // Brightness / contrast
            if (template.BrightnessAdj != 0)
                SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapBrightness.SetValue((TWFix32)template.BrightnessAdj));
            if (template.ContrastAdj != 0)
                SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapContrast.SetValue((TWFix32)template.ContrastAdj));

            // Auto de-skew
            if (template.DeSkew)
                SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapAutomaticDeskew.SetValue(BoolType.True));

            // Skip blank pages
            if (template.SkipBlankPages)
                SafeSet(() => source.Capabilities.ICapAutoDiscardBlankPages.SetValue(BlankPage.Auto));

            // Brand-specific JSON overrides
            if (_profile != null)
                ApplyBrandCapabilities(source, _profile.GetCapabilities());
        }
```

**Threshold:** There is no TWAIN threshold capability in `ApplyCapabilities` or `ApplyBrandCapabilities`. Supported TWAIN keys include resolution, pixel type, duplex, brightness, contrast, deskew, etc., but no threshold.

### Template model (`ApiModels.cs`)

```123:139:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Models\ApiModels.cs
    public class ScanTemplate
    {
        public int TemplateID { get; set; }
        public string TemplateName { get; set; } = "";
        public string Description { get; set; } = "";
        public int PageCount { get; set; } = 24;
        public int DPI { get; set; } = 300;
        public string ColorMode { get; set; } = "Grayscale";
        public string PageSize { get; set; } = "A4";
        public string DuplexMode { get; set; } = "Simplex";
        public int JpegQuality { get; set; } = 85;
        public int BrightnessAdj { get; set; } = 0;
        public int ContrastAdj { get; set; } = 0;
        public bool SkipBlankPages { get; set; } = false;
        public bool DeSkew { get; set; } = true;

        public override string ToString() => $"{TemplateName} ({PageCount}pp)";
    }
```

`ScanTemplate` has no threshold property.

---

## 2. Image Processing (Trim and Deskew)

### `ImageHelper.cs`

Main entry point:

```31:70:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Utils\ImageHelper.cs
        /// <summary>
        /// Optionally corrects skew and then crops to the tightest bounding box
        /// of non-white content.  When <paramref name="deskew"/> is false only the
        /// crop step runs, which still removes dark scanner borders.
        /// </summary>
        public static Bitmap AutoTrimAndDeskew(Bitmap src, bool deskew)
        {
            // AForge requires 24bpp RGB as input for most filters
            Bitmap rgb = EnsureRgb24(src);

            if (deskew)
            {
                try
                {
                    // Build an 8bpp grayscale copy for the skew detector
                    Bitmap gray = Grayscale.CommonAlgorithms.BT709.Apply(rgb);

                    var checker = new DocumentSkewChecker();
                    double angle = checker.GetSkewAngle(gray);
                    // ...
                    if (Math.Abs(angle) > 0.3 && Math.Abs(angle) < 45.0)
                    {
                        var rotateFilter = new RotateBilinear(-angle, keepSize: false)
                        {
                            FillColor = Color.White,
                        };
                        Bitmap rotated = rotateFilter.Apply(rgb);
                        // ...
                    }
                }
                catch { /* ... */ }
            }

            Bitmap cropped = CropToContent(rgb);
            // ...
        }
```

Trimming uses a fixed “white” threshold:

```108:112:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Utils\ImageHelper.cs
        private static Bitmap CropToContent(Bitmap src)
        {
            const int WhiteThreshold = 240; // pixel channel value considered "white"
            const int MarginPx       = 4;   // leave a few pixels of padding
```

Only `WhiteThreshold` (240) and `MarginPx` (4) exist; they are hardcoded and not exposed as template settings.

---

## 3. PDF Generation

### `PdfService.cs`

Compression options:

```17:31:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\PdfService.cs
        /// <summary>
        /// Controls how aggressively images are compressed when building the PDF.
        /// The saved JPEG page files are left untouched — only the PDF copy is affected.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="JpegQuality">
        /// JPEG re-encode quality written into the PDF (1–100).
        /// 70 is a good balance: ~40 % smaller than the 85 % archival copy.
        /// </param>
        /// <param name="MaxDpi">
        /// Images scanned above this DPI are downscaled before embedding.
        /// 150 DPI is sufficient for on-screen reading; 0 disables downscaling.
        /// Downscaling 300→150 DPI alone saves ~75 % of image data.
        /// </param>
        public record CompressionOptions(int JpegQuality = 70, int MaxDpi = 150);
```

Downscaling and re-encoding:

```81:93:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\PdfService.cs
            if (options.MaxDpi > 0 && (srcDpiX > options.MaxDpi || srcDpiY > options.MaxDpi))
            {
                double scaleX = options.MaxDpi / (double)srcDpiX;
                double scaleY = options.MaxDpi / (double)srcDpiY;
                double scale  = Math.Min(scaleX, scaleY);
                targetW = Math.Max(1, (int)(original.Width  * scale));
                targetH = Math.Max(1, (int)(original.Height * scale));
            }
```

`CompressionOptions` is fixed in code: **JpegQuality = 70**, **MaxDpi = 150**.

---

## 4. Upload to API

### `ApiService.cs`

Booklet upload:

```159:177:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\ApiService.cs
        /// <summary>POSTs the booklet JSON payload to the server.</summary>
        public async Task<bool> SaveBookletAsync(SaveBookletRequest request)
        {
            var url  = $"{BaseUrl}/api/scan/booklet";
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(request, _jsonSettings);

            AppLogger.Info($"POST {url}  payloadBytes={Encoding.UTF8.GetByteCount(json)}  " +
                           $"bookletId={request.Booklet?.BookletId}  pages={request.Pages.Count}");
            // ...
            content.Headers.Add("X-Workstation", Environment.MachineName);

            response = await _client.PostAsync(url, content);
```

`UploadBookletAsync` builds `SaveBookletRequest` from `LocalBookletRecord` and calls `SaveBookletAsync`:

```224:266:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Services\ApiService.cs
        public async Task<bool> UploadBookletAsync(LocalBookletRecord record)
        {
            // ...
            var bookletData = new BookletData
            {
                BookletId          = record.BookletId,
                ExamId             = record.ExamId,
                PaperId            = record.PaperId,
                // ...
            };
            var request = new SaveBookletRequest { Booklet = bookletData, Pages = pages };
            return await SaveBookletAsync(request);
        }
```

Endpoint: `POST {BaseUrl}/api/scan/booklet`, JSON body, Bearer auth, `X-Workstation` header. No file upload; the API receives JSON with booklet metadata and page references; image files are expected at the `FilePath` locations on the server or elsewhere.

---

## 5. Template Settings in the UI

### `MainForm.cs`

Templates come from the API and are bound to a ComboBox:

```416:424:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Forms\MainForm.cs
        private void LoadTemplates()
        {
            _cboTemplate.Items.Clear();
            if (_settings?.Templates == null) return;
            foreach (var t in _settings.Templates)
                _cboTemplate.Items.Add(t);
            if (_cboTemplate.Items.Count > 0)
            {
                _cboTemplate.SelectedIndex = 0;
                CboTemplate_Changed(null, EventArgs.Empty); // populate info label immediately
            }
        }
```

Display of the selected template:

```439:455:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\scanner-desktop\ScannerApp\Forms\MainForm.cs
        private void CboTemplate_Changed(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _selectedTemplate = _cboTemplate.SelectedItem as ScanTemplate;
            if (_selectedTemplate is ScanTemplate t)
            {
                _chkSkipBlank.Checked = t.SkipBlankPages;
                UpdateTemplateInfoExtras();
                _lblTemplateInfo.ForeColor = ColorText;
                SetStatus($"Template: {t.TemplateName}", false);
            }
            // ...
        }

        private void UpdateTemplateInfoExtras()
        {
            if (_selectedTemplate is not ScanTemplate t) return;
            string extras = "";
            if (t.DeSkew) extras += "  De-skew";
            if (_chkSkipBlank.Checked) extras += "  Skip-blanks";
            _lblTemplateInfo.Text =
                $"{t.DPI} DPI  •  {t.ColorMode}  •  {t.PageSize}\r\n" +
                $"{t.PageCount} pages  •  {t.DuplexMode}  •  JPEG {t.JpegQuality}%\r\n" +
                (extras.Length > 0 ? extras.TrimStart() : "No extras");
        }
```

Template info shown in the left panel: DPI, ColorMode, PageSize, PageCount, DuplexMode, JpegQuality, and extras (De-skew, Skip-blanks). These are display-only; there are no extra controls to edit individual template values in the form.

---

## Summary Table

| Area | Location | Key details |
|------|----------|-------------|
| **Scan settings** | `ScannerService.cs`, `TwainScannerService.cs` | DPI, color mode, brightness, contrast from `ScanTemplate`. No threshold. |
| **Image processing** | `ImageHelper.cs` | AForge `DocumentSkewChecker` + `RotateBilinear`, `CropToContent` with `WhiteThreshold = 240`, `MarginPx = 4`. |
| **PDF generation** | `PdfService.cs` | Fixed `CompressionOptions(JpegQuality: 70, MaxDpi: 150)`; no template-driven settings. |
| **API upload** | `ApiService.cs` | `POST /api/scan/booklet` with JSON; metadata and page paths; no raw image upload. |
| **Template UI** | `MainForm.cs` | `_cboTemplate` + `_lblTemplateInfo` show DPI, color mode, page size, page count, duplex, JpegQuality, DeSkew, Skip blanks. |
